name: Sambal Oelek (Chillies & Spices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chillies, shrimp paste, and salt together in a mortar.
2. Stir in the tamarind juice.
Alternatively, blend all ingredients in a blender.
This mixture is an ingredient used in most Indonesian dishes and can be kept in the refrigerator for several weeks.
